name: stackra/theme
purpose: Design-token store per Tenant — Theme active record, ThemePreset shipped catalogue, and ThemeTokenOverride sparse patches applied on top of a preset.
capabilities: ThemeTokenOverride sparse patch on top of a preset
when_to_use: Letting a tenant customise their brand colors and typography without a frontend redeploy.
when_not_to_use: For binary brand assets (logos, favicons, OG images), use the sibling stackra/branding package.
